name: @narada2/nars-session-mcp
description: Governed MCP input and bounded readback for existing NARS sessions.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @narada2/mcp-e2e-harness build && pnpm build && node dist/test/nars-session-mcp.test.js && node dist/test/site-fabric-session-e2e.test.js
scripts.test:e2e:site-fabric: pnpm --filter @narada2/mcp-e2e-harness build && pnpm build && node dist/test/site-fabric-session-e2e.test.js
